about.title: Deuterium-Depleted Water (DDW)
about.description: Deuterium-Depleted Water (DDW) is water with a naturally lower concentration of deuterium, a heavier form of hydrogen found in all water.
about.content: Lower deuterium levels are an area of scientific interest due to their relationship with cellular energy efficiency. DDW represents a precise, science-driven approach to everyday hydration.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.description: Deutronix is a health-focused company dedicated to the research, development, and education of deuterium-depleted water applications. Guided by science, quality, and long-term responsibility, we develop wellness solutions designed to support modern lifestyles with clarity and care.

hero.title: About Deutronix
hero.subtitle: Precision Wellness, Guided by Science
hero.p1: Deutronix is a wellness-focused company dedicated to the research, development, and responsible application of Deuterium-Depleted Water (DDW).
hero.p2: We apply DDW science with precision — creating purpose-built formulations designed to support everyday hydration and targeted mobility needs.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.p1: Deutronix is built on a single scientific platform, applied thoughtfully across different wellness applications.
approach.p2: Each product is developed with clearly defined intent, measured parameters, and transparent communication.
approach.p3: We believe precision matters more than exaggeration.

science.title: Science & Responsibility
science.p1: Our work is guided by an international scientific advisory team spanning nutrition, biomedical science, and water research.
science.p2: We reference established research, maintain responsible boundaries, and avoid overstated claims.
science.p3: Education comes before promotion. Responsibility comes before trends.

quality.title: Quality & Standards
quality.p1: Our DDW is naturally sourced from pristine glacial regions and produced under strict quality, hygiene, and safety standards, aligned with internationally recognised systems and local regulatory requirements.
quality.p2: Consistency, traceability, and verification are central to how we operate.

quote.line1: Deutronix is built for the long term
quote.line2: where science, precision, and trust come together.

whatIsDeuterium.title: What is Deuterium?
whatIsDeuterium.p1: Deuterium is a naturally occurring form of hydrogen found in all water. Because it is heavier than regular hydrogen, it behaves differently inside the body at the cellular level.
whatIsDeuterium.p2: All natural water contains deuterium. The difference lies in how much.

whatIsDDW.title: What is Deuterium-Depleted Water (DDW)?
whatIsDDW.p1: Deuterium-Depleted Water (DDW) is water with a naturally reduced concentration of deuterium compared to ordinary drinking water.
whatIsDDW.p2: Lower deuterium levels are an area of scientific interest because deuterium concentration can influence how efficiently cells produce and manage energy. By reducing deuterium intake through hydration, DDW is designed to support more efficient cellular processes and metabolic balance.
whatIsDDW.p3: DDW is not a drug, treatment, or supplement.
whatIsDDW.p4: It is a refined approach to hydration, developed through science and nature.

whyMatter.title: Why Deuterium Levels Matter
whyMatter.p1: At the cellular level, energy production is a delicate and precise process. Research suggests that excess deuterium may interfere with normal cellular energy efficiency due to its heavier molecular structure.
whyMatter.p2: By lowering deuterium exposure through daily hydration, DDW is designed to support:
whyMatter.p3: This is why DDW is often described as precision hydration, rather than ordinary water.

naturalVsArtificial.title: Natural vs Artificial Low-Deuterium Water
naturalVsArtificial.p1: Not all low-deuterium water is the same.
naturalVsArtificial.p2: Some products reduce deuterium through artificial methods such as electrolysis or chemical alteration. While deuterium levels may change, the natural molecular structure of the water can be affected.
naturalVsArtificial.p3: Deutronix DDW is naturally low in deuterium, formed through rare environmental conditions over time.

precision.title: Precision, Not Excess
precision.p2: Our approach to DDW is guided by precision, not exaggeration.
precision.p3: Each formulation is carefully monitored to maintain:
precision.p4: DDW is intended to support everyday wellness as part of a balanced lifestyle.

source.title: Our Natural Source
source.p1: Our DDW originates from ancient glacial snowmelt in the Altai Mountain region, one of the world's most pristine and isolated high-altitude environments.
source.p2: Over thousands of years, long-distance atmospheric movement, freezing temperatures, and natural filtration gradually reduce deuterium levels — without human intervention.
source.p3: This natural process creates a rare water profile that:
source.p4: Nature does the work. Science ensures transparency.

advisory.title: Scientific Advisory Board
advisory.subtitle: Guiding DDW research, formulation, and responsible application.
advisory.p1: At Deutronix, our DDW research and product development are guided by an international scientific advisory board with expertise spanning biomedical science, nutrition, glaciology, and water resource research.
advisory.p2: Their role is to provide scientific guidance, academic insight, and responsible oversight in the exploration and application of deuterium-depleted water.

advisors.name: Professor Cong Feng Song
advisors.title: Professor | Functional Nutrition
advisors.description: Expert in functional nutrition and long-term wellness research, with a focus on metabolic health and low-deuterium science education.

advisors.name: Professor Wang Fei Teng
advisors.title: Professor | Glaciology & Cryosphere Science
advisors.description: Research specialist in glacial systems and cryosphere science, contributing expertise on natural low-deuterium water formation and high-altitude water sources.

advisors.name: Guo De Yong
advisors.title: DDW Resource Specialist
advisors.description: Specialist in natural deuterium-depleted water resources and sustainable development of low-deuterium water sources.

advisors.name: Doctor Li Hui Lin
advisors.title: Doctor | Cryosphere & DDW Research
advisors.description: Researcher in cryosphere science and low-deuterium water studies, contributing international academic perspectives on water science.

philosophy.title: A Responsible Wellness Philosophy
philosophy.p2: DDW represents a growing area of scientific exploration, and we remain committed to responsible development, transparent communication, and continuous research collaboration.
philosophy.p3: Our goal is not to promise outcomes, but to provide thoughtfully developed wellness solutions grounded in science, nature, and long-term responsibility.

quote.line1: Deuterium-Depleted Water is not about trends.
quote.line2: It is about understanding water, more precisely.

hero.title: Source & Standards
hero.subtitle: Quality You Can Trace. Standards You Can Trust.
hero.p1: At Deutronix, quality is not an afterthought — it is built into every stage of sourcing, formulation, production, and verification.
hero.p2: Our products are developed with a clear commitment to purity, consistency, safety, and responsible production, guided by internationally recognised standards and regulatory requirements.

water.title: Our Water Source
water.p1: Our deuterium-depleted water is naturally sourced from the Altai Mountain glacial region, one of the world's most pristine and isolated high-altitude environments.
water.p2: This region's unique climatic conditions — long-distance atmospheric movement, freezing temperatures, and natural filtration — contribute to a naturally low and stable deuterium profile.
water.p3: We do not artificially alter the water's structure.
water.p4: Nature forms the foundation. Science ensures consistency.

cert.title: Certifications & Compliance
cert.p1: Deutronix products and production facilities are produced and verified in accordance with internationally recognised quality and safety standards, including:
cert.p2: Where applicable, products are notified and regulated in compliance with local authority requirements, including Malaysia's Ministry of Health.
cert.p3: Certifications are not used as marketing claims. They are operational requirements we adhere to.

product.title: Product-Specific Compliance
product.p1: Different products require different regulatory pathways.
product.ddwP: Produced under food safety and quality management systems appropriate for daily consumption.
product.gelP: Manufactured under cosmetic regulatory requirements and notified in accordance with applicable local regulations.
product.p2: Each product is evaluated and managed based on its intended use — responsibly and transparently.

commit.title: Our Commitment to Responsibility
commit.p2: At Deutronix, we avoid exaggerated claims and shortcuts.
commit.p3: Our focus is on long-term trust, not short-term persuasion.

quote.line1: Quality is not what we claim.
quote.line2: It is what we follow — every step of the way.

hero.title: Precision for Every Need.
hero.description: Two precision applications of Deuterium-Depleted Water, engineered with clearly defined deuterium levels to support the body from within and from without. Each formulation is optimized for its specific purpose. Measured, intentional, and uncompromised.

product.title: Designed for Daily Hydration with Purpose
product.description: DDW+ is formulated with a naturally reduced deuterium level of 132–138 ppm, making it suitable for long-term, daily consumption. This specific ppm range is intentionally chosen to balance effectiveness, safety, and consistency — supporting everyday wellness without overstimulation.

c1.title: Athletes
c1.desc: Training and competition put stress on the body. DDW+ helps optimize cellular energy and reduce oxidative stress, promoting faster recovery and enhanced performance.

c2.title: Working Professionals
c2.desc: Mental fatigue and stress are common in busy lifestyles. DDW+ enhances brain clarity, energy, and stress resilience.

c3.title:
Chronic Condition
Management Population
c3.desc: Those with metabolic or fatigue-related conditions benefit from DDW+'s support for cell function, mitochondrial health, and overall vitality.

c4.title: Health Seekers
c4.desc: Health-conscious individuals seek clean, effective ways to maintain vitality. DDW+ supports detox, immunity, and balanced metabolism naturally.

c5.title: Aging & Elderly
c5.desc: Aging involves a natural decline in cell energy and repair. DDW+ helps slow down aging, protect DNA, and maintain energy for active aging.

ppm.title: Why 132–138 ppm Matters
ppm.p1: Not all deuterium-depleted water products clearly disclose their deuterium concentration on the bottle label.
ppm.p2: At Deutronix, we openly state 132–138 ppm because precision and transparency are part of our product philosophy. This range reflects a naturally low and stable deuterium level, carefully monitored to ensure consistency and suitability for daily hydration.
ppm.p3: Declaring the ppm is not a requirement — it is a deliberate choice. A choice to communicate clearly, measure accurately, and allow consumers to understand exactly what they are drinking.

cta.title:
DDW+ is not designed
for short-term intervention.
It is designed for everyday hydration
refined by science and nature.

hero.title: Targeted Recovery with Precision.
hero.description: EasyMove Gel is formulated with 50 ppm ultra-low deuterium deuterium-depleted water, designed specifically for targeted, external application. This formulation is engineered to support deeper absorption and localized comfort where muscles and joints require focused recovery support.

product.title: Designed for Targeted Recovery with Purpose
product.p2: This integrated approach supports smoother application, enhanced absorption, and warming comfort in localized areas — without overwhelming the body.
product.p3: The formulation is intentional, measured, and uncompromised.

suitable.title: Who Is EasyMove Gel Suitable For?

c1.title: Joint Pain / Knee Pain
c1.desc: The most common complaint among elderly individuals. EasyMove Gel is suitable for supporting daily joint comfort and easing stiffness around the knees, hands, and joints during movement.

c2.title: Lower Back Pain
c2.desc: Back discomfort from aging, posture changes, or long-term strain is very common. EasyMove Gel provides warming support to help relax muscles and improve comfort during daily activities.

c3.title: Frozen Shoulder
c3.desc: Stiff shoulders and limited arm movement often affect seniors. EasyMove Gel is suitable for warming the shoulder area to support flexibility and smoother movement.

c4.title: Muscle Weakness & Stiffness
c4.desc: As circulation and muscle elasticity decline with age, stiffness becomes more noticeable. EasyMove Gel supports muscle relaxation and comfort, especially before movement or exercise.

c5.title: Difficulty Walking / Reduced Mobility
c5.desc: For elderly individuals who feel tightness, heaviness, or discomfort when walking. EasyMove Gel helps provide warming comfort to support smoother, more confident movement.

formulation.title: Formulation Design
formulation.subtitle: Plant-Based Functional Composition
formulation.desc: EasyMove Gel is developed using a precision-based topical formulation strategy. Each botanical extract is selected for compatibility, stability, and localized application performance.

ingredients.name: Loquat Leaf Extract
ingredients.desc: Traditionally used in botanical preparations, loquat leaf extract is included to support localized comfort and contribute to a balanced topical formulation profile.

ingredients.name: Licorice Root Extract
ingredients.desc: A well-known botanical ingredient valued in topical formulations for its skin-conditioning properties and ability to support overall skin comfort.

ingredients.name: Siler Root Extract
ingredients.desc: Traditionally incorporated in external botanical applications, selected to complement formulations intended for areas of physical tension.

ingredients.name: Mugwort Leaf Extract
ingredients.desc: Commonly used in warming topical preparations, included to enhance sensory comfort and support localized application.

ingredients.name: Sophora Root Extract
ingredients.desc: A botanical extract traditionally used in topical preparations to support skin balance and localized comfort.

ingredients.name: Skullcap Root Extract
ingredients.desc: Rich in naturally occurring flavonoids, selected to contribute to formulation stability and skin-conditioning support.

ingredients.name: Calendula Extract
ingredients.desc: Widely used in botanical topical applications, valued for supporting skin conditioning and soothing formulation characteristics.

ppm.title: Why 50 ppm Matters
ppm.p1: Not all deuterium-depleted formulations are intended for the same purpose.
ppm.p2: EasyMove Gel is formulated with 50 ppm DDW because topical delivery requires lighter molecular behavior than daily drinking water. This ultra-low deuterium level is selected to support smoother penetration and more effective delivery of herbal actives into targeted areas.
ppm.p3: Stating the ppm is not a marketing statement — it reflects formulation intent, precision, and transparency.

cta.title:
50 ppm
formulated for targeted comfort,
not general hydration.
